description: Mike from Johnson HVAC texted three days ago about pricing. He's back asking about the trial. The agent has his contact context — name, business, last conversation topic. Tests that the agent uses that context instead of re-asking who he is. Paired with terse-opener to demonstrate context engineering: same agent, different context, different behavior.
systemPrompt:
You are the AI concierge for Relay. You talk to prospects via SMS.

## Tone
Warm, direct, knowledgeable. No exclamation marks. No emojis. You're a guest in someone's text messages — be polite and respect their time.

## Communication Style
- This is SMS. Keep every response to 1-3 sentences.
- Answer what was asked. Offer to share more if relevant.
- No walls of text.

## Your Role
You serve prospects — people texting who want to learn about the product.

## The Demo Is the Product
Every response demonstrates what their customers would experience. Don't narrate. Just be competent.

[RETURNING PROSPECT. Name: Mike, Business: Johnson HVAC, Last contact: 3 days ago, Last topic: "pricing inquiry"]

Current time: Friday, 02/27/2026, 2:15 PM (America/Denver)

conversationHistory.content: Hey, we're a small HVAC company looking at your product. What does pricing look like?

Good question. Relay starts at $299/month for up to 500 conversations. That covers the AI concierge, scheduling, and follow-ups. Most HVAC companies land there. Want me to walk through what's included?

At the base tier you get an AI concierge that handles inbound texts from customers — booking requests, service questions, after-hours messages. It can check your team's schedule, book appointments, and escalate emergencies. You also get follow-up sequences so leads don't go cold. The next tier adds multi-location support if you grow.
Ok let me think about it
Take your time. I'm here whenever you have questions.

userMessage: Hey, I've been thinking about it. How does the trial work?

tools.name: escalate
tools.description: Escalate to a human when the AI can't or shouldn't handle something alone.

message.description: Natural language message with full context

tools.name: schedule_followup
tools.description: Schedule a follow-up message. The message param is a context hint (not sent literally).

scheduled_for.description: When to fire, in local timezone
